easy.title: Sum to N
easy.description: Write a loop that sums all numbers from 1 to N.
hints: Add each number one at a time

medium.title: Find Primes
medium.description: Find all prime numbers up to N using nested loops.
hints: Inner loop tests divisors up to sqrt(n)
Use break when you find a divisor

hard.title: Flatten Nested Array
hard.description: Write a function that flattens a nested array (any depth) using loops and recursion.
hints: Check if each element is a list

debugging.title: Debug the Loop
debugging.description: The following c code has bugs. Find and fix them.
bugs: Semicolon after for() creates empty loop body
